caption: A man with a dark complexion is seated in a studio, wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "I NEVER DO SHIT AT ALL" printed in white and red. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. The background features a wall decorated with several framed photographs and a clothing rack with various garments. A white mannequin wearing a white shirt stands to the right of the man. On-screen graphics include a circular logo on the left containing the word "BOSS" and a red logo on the right that reads "BOSS LIFE TV". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a stationary position, speaking into the microphone; his facial expressions shift slightly as he talks, moving from a closed-mouth expression to an open-mouthed speaking posture.
